## What changed

Describe the user-visible or contract-level outcome.

## Why

Link the issue, incident, or evidence that motivated the change.

## Verification

List the exact commands and retained evidence used to verify the change.

## Boundaries

- [ ] No credential, private prompt, customer data, private trace URL, or local home path is included.
- [ ] Contract or public-behavior changes include a `docs-impact.json` whose changed contracts resolve to the exact affected-claim union in `docs/contract-claims.json`.
- [ ] New agent behavior includes deterministic evaluation coverage.
- [ ] External or paid validation is labeled separately from local proof.
